arts.ttl: Besiktas Explores Insigne Transfer, Player Weighs Options
arts.sum: Besiktas have made initial inquiries about signing Lorenzo Insigne, potentially paving the way for the Italian forward's return to European football. The Turkish club's interest comes as Insigne contemplates his future with Toronto FC in Major League Soccer. The post Besiktas Explores Insigne Transfer, Player Weighs Options appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Europa League final day - who is through and what's at stake?
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham and Rangers all have something at stake on what promises to be a thrilling final day of the Europa League league phase.

arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: Besiktas star on radar ahead of winter window deadline?
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are allegedly contemplating whether to make an approach for one of Besiktas' star men before the end of the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Preview: FC Twente vs. Besiktas - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between FC Twente and Besiktas, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: FC Twente pick up key midfielder from relegation threatened Sparta Rotterdam
arts.sum: FC Twente have announced the signing of 27-year-old midfielder Arno Verschueren from relegation threatened Sparta Rotterdam. The Belgian attacking midfielder has signed a deal until 2028 with his new side…
